claims.summary: Requested-token bands should remain cost diagnostics rather than causes of felt friction.
claims.disposition: Verified token bands are bounded diagnostic labels with no generation-control authority.

claims.summary: Exact control-marker matching should make no identity, meaning, ownership, or spectral claim.
claims.disposition: Verified private exact-match constructors and explicit source comments enforce that boundary.

claims.summary: Ordinary quoted, grouped, and relational marker references should remain visible.
claims.disposition: Verified marker-context regressions preserve nonfunctional language.

claims.summary: Pressure or entropy should be inferred as the cause of marker matches or token-band changes.
claims.disposition: Rejected as unsupported numeric-to-behavior and numeric-to-felt causation.

claims.summary: Spectral confidence should alter exact control-marker sanitization.
claims.disposition: Preserved as a Tier 5 safety and model-control boundary change requiring separate approval.
